tasks.title: Redesign UI with modern, visually compelling styles
tasks.description: Redesign the portfolio UI with modern, polished aesthetics. Steps: 1) Read existing files in src/pages/, src/sections/, src/components/ to understand current structure. 2) Research contemporary portfolio design trends (modern color palettes, clean layouts, generous whitespace, modern typography, subtle animations). 3) Update global styles in src/index.css and src/App.css. 4) Redesign all page styles: src/pages/Home.css, About.css, Projects.css, Skills.css, Contact.css. 5) Update component styles: src/components/Navbar.css, Footer.css, src/sections/Contact.css. 6) Ensure responsive design across mobile/tablet/desktop using modern CSS (flexbox, grid, media queries). 7) Maintain accessibility standards. 8) Update JSX files if needed for layout improvements. 9) Update or verify existing tests in src/components/, src/pages/, src/sections/ still pass after visual changes. If tests fail due to DOM changes, update them to match new structure while maintaining coverage. 10) Follow screenshot workflow: start dev server, take screenshots of Home, About, Projects pages, verify visual quality, stop server.
acceptance_criteria: All page and component styles modernized with contemporary design
Responsive design works on mobile, tablet, desktop
Accessibility maintained (semantic HTML, ARIA, color contrast)
All tests pass (updated if needed for new DOM structure)
Screenshots confirm modern, visually compelling UI

tasks.title: Validate UI redesign maintains functionality
tasks.description: Run the complete test suite to verify the UI redesign did not break functionality. Execute 'npm test' or 'npx vitest run'. All tests should pass. Report any failures with full error messages.
acceptance_criteria: Navigation and interaction features work correctly
